verdict_reason: The engineering layer preserves the verse's primary claim — buddhi crosses moha-kalilam, nirveda arises spontaneously — and operationalizes it without flattening to motivational text. The Sanskrit terminology (moha-kalilam, nirveda, śrotavyasya/śrutasya) is preserved in the engineering body. The natural-not-cynical character is preserved. The scoped nature of nirveda (specifically to phala-promising chains) is explicitly preserved. The verse is not trivialized as 'don't get distracted by new tools'; it is rendered as the maturation that produces a specific evaluative posture. Pass.
